name: Ficoll-Paque Density Gradient Solution (1.077 g/mL for PBMC)
nameCn: Ficoll-Paque 密度梯度液（PBMC 分离用，1.077 g/mL）

components.name: Diatrizoate sodium (sodium diatrizoate / Hypaque-sodium, 50% solution)
components.note: MW 635.1; provides radiopacity and density modulation. Sterile solution.

notes.en: Target density: 1.077 g/mL at 20°C. Verify with calibrated pycnometer or densitometer. Adjust: more Ficoll → higher density; more diluent → lower density. At 1.077 g/mL: erythrocytes + granulocytes (1.08–1.09) sink; PBMCs (1.07–1.075) band at interface; platelets stay in plasma layer. pH 7.2–7.4. Osmolality: 290–310 mOsm. Warm to room temperature before use (critical for proper separation). Commercially available as Ficoll-Paque PLUS (Cytiva), Lymphoprep (Stem Cell Technologies), Histopaque-1077 (Sigma).
notes.zh: 目标密度：20°C 时 1.077 g/mL。用校准比重计或密度计验证。调整：增加 Ficoll → 密度升高；增加稀释液 → 密度降低。1.077 g/mL 时：红细胞 + 粒细胞（1.08–1.09）沉入底部；PBMC（1.07–1.075）在界面成带；血小板留在血浆层。pH 7.2–7.4。渗透压：290–310 mOsm。使用前务必恢复室温（对分离效果至关重要）。商品化产品：Ficoll-Paque PLUS（Cytiva）、Lymphoprep（Stem Cell Technologies）、Histopaque-1077（Sigma）。

ref: Boyum (1968) Scand J Clin Lab Invest Suppl 97:77–89; Broxmeyer et al. (2011) Curr Protoc Stem Cell Biol 19:Unit2A.3; GE Healthcare Ficoll-Paque PLUS Instructions 71-7167-00

storage.notes: Warm to RT before use; do not freeze

usage.en: Density gradient solution (1.077 g/mL) for isolating peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs).
usage.zh: 密度 1.077 g/mL 的梯度液，用于从外周血分离单个核细胞（PBMC）。
